quote.text: Do not be embarrassed by your failures, learn from them and start again.
quote.author: Richard Branson
quote.analysis: Every successful institutional data platform we've seen was preceded by at least one failed attempt. The difference between firms that eventually get it right and those that give up is whether they treated the failure as a learning dataset or a reason to stop investing. The second attempt, informed by the first's scars, is almost always the one that sticks.
